summary: Iteration 172 — Labor Margin & Diary Hours Integration Bug Fix Verification. All 12 tests PASSED (100%). Verified: (1) requirements.txt does NOT contain --extra-index-url, (2) nixpacks.toml exists with correct Railway deployment config, (3) Diary CRUD endpoints work (POST/GET/DELETE), (4) Operator CRUD endpoints work, (5) Diary riepilogo aggregation works, (6) CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: both get_commessa_margin_full AND get_all_margins now correctly include diary hours (diario_produzione ore_totali) in ore_lavorate and costo_personale calculations.
critical_code_review_comments: The margin_service.py fix at lines 210-220 correctly pre-fetches diary hours per commessa for get_all_margins()
The ore_totali field (person-hours = ore * num_operatori) is correctly aggregated from diario_produzione
Both single commessa margin-full and all-margins endpoints include diary hours in calculations

test_credentials.note: Test data auto-created and cleaned up by pytest fixtures

seed_data_creation: Auto-created test user, session, commessa (stato=in_lavorazione, value=10000, ore_lavorate=5), company_costs (costo_orario_pieno=35), and diary entries. All cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Labor margin diary integration bug is verified fixed. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration172_labor_margin_diary.py with 12 comprehensive tests covering: file config checks (requirements.txt, nixpacks.toml), diary CRUD, operator CRUD, riepilogo aggregation, and margin calculations with diary hours. All endpoints require session auth (cookie or Bearer token).
verified_fixes: requirements.txt no longer contains --extra-index-url (moved to nixpacks.toml for Railway)
nixpacks.toml exists at /app/backend/nixpacks.toml with correct [phases.install] config
get_commessa_margin_full() includes diary ore_totali in ore_lavorate (line 42-47)
get_all_margins() pre-fetches diary hours per commessa (lines 210-220) and includes them in calculations
